title: elaeodendron anjouanense
intro: Elaeodendron anjouanense, also known as the Anjouan tree, is a species of flowering plant in the family Celastraceae. It is native to the island of Anjouan in the Comoros archipelago. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial activities. The health benefits of Elaeodendron anjouanense include reducing fever, relieving pain, and treating various infections, and it can be prepared as an herbal tea, infusion, or tincture.
